description:
The quiz assesses familiarity with JavaScript's native Date API, challenging users with multiple‑choice questions that range from basic usage to nuanced quirks. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, adopting an encouraging, informal teaching tone that aims to both test and deepen knowledge.
Topics: JavaScript Date object, Date constructors and parsing, Timezone handling, Date arithmetic and formatting, Common pitfalls and best practices
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript programmers, and anyone who regularly works with dates in web applications, especially those with some experience but looking to solidify their understanding of the native Date API.
